sentences.arabic: زَرَعَ أَهْلُ الْحَيِّ أَشْجَارًا جَدِيدَةً فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici kvarta posadili su nova stabla u ulici.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood residents planted new trees in the street.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ مُتَطَوِّعُونَ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الْأَهْلِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi volonteri su došli da pomognu stanovnicima.
sentences.translationEn: Young volunteers came to help the residents.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ الْجَمِيعُ مَعًا لِجَعْلِ الشَّارِعِ أَخْضَرَ.
sentences.translation: Svi su radili zajedno da ulicu učine zelenijom.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone worked together to make the street greener.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ رَئِيسُ الْحَيِّ الْمُتَطَوِّعِينَ عَلَى عَمَلِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik kvarta zahvalio je volonterima na njihovom radu.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood head thanked the volunteers for their work.
